title: Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court - Day 16
description: Senior Advocate Rajeev Dhavan: We must make a very important distinction between constitutional values which may enter the Court’s deliberative or interpretive imagination, and values which are converted into actual limitations upon a fundamental right.There is a profound constitutional difference between evaluating something on the one hand, and transforming that evaluation into a restriction or limitation on the right itself. That distinction is fundamental to our understanding of Part III.I w
